Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Šogad apaļa jubileja ir horeogrāfei, deju svētku virsvadītājai un pedagoģei Ivetai Pētersonei-Lazdānei, un viņa, smaidīga un šarmanta, ver raidījuma "Daudz laimes, jubilār!" filmēšanas studijas durvis. Iveta ir Rīgas meitene, kas jau no agras bērnības nopietni pievērsusies skatuviskajai dejai - "Dzintariņā", kur sākās mazās dejotājas deju stundas, Zinaīdas Zeltmates augsto profesionālo standartu prasīgumā citādi nemaz nebija iespējams. Mācoties Rīgas Franču licejā, Iveta dejojusi arī skolas deju kolektīvā "Auseklītis", kura vadītājas godā vēlāk nokļuvusi pati. "Auseklītis" regulāri pārstāvējis Latviju starptautiskos festivālos Francijā, Venecuēlā, Krievijā, Rumānijā un Turcijā. Ar "Auseklīti" gribējuši sadarboties arī citi horeogrāfi, iestudējot dažādus plaši izskanējušus uzvedumus, piemēram, Jāņa Purviņa deju uzvedumu "12 brāļi" (2006), Agra Daņiļeviča dejas izrādi "Parīzes zēns" (2012), kuras režijas un libreta autore, starp citu, ir Iveta Pētersone-Lazdāne. Deju kolektīvs piedalījies arī abos vērienīgajos režisora Uģa Brikmaņa un horeogrāfa Agra Daņiļeviča dejas izrādes iestudējumos "No zobena saule lēca" (2011 un 2013). Atkāpjoties vēsturē un atgriežoties pie Ivetas jaunības izaugsmes ceļa, nozīmīgs solis ir vēl kāds deju kolektīvs, proti, "Rotaļa" harismātiskās Aijas Baumanes vadībā, kura, līdzīgi kā daudzas citas mūsu skatuviskās dejas zvaigznes, savā deju kolektīvā ienesa izaicinošos baleta skatuves standartus. Interesanti, ka arī tagad, veidojot deju soļus un zīmējumus savos projektos, Iveta cieši sadarbojas ar mūsdienu baleta zvaigzni Antonu Freimanu, kā arī citiem augstas raudzes skatuves dejas meistariem. Profesionālo izglītību Pētersone-Lazdāne ieguvusi Mūzikas akadēmijas Horeogrāfijas nodaļā - gan bakalaura, gan maģistrantūras studijās, un kopš 2012. gada viņas radošā laboratorija ir tautas deju ansamblis "Daiļrade" - viens no mūsu valsts vadošajiem deju kolektīviem.

programme.title: Aculiecinieks
programme.desc: 13 minūšu gari televīzijas stāsti vēsta par notikumiem un Latvijā īpašiem cilvēkiem, aptverot vēsturiskus, zinātnes, izglītības, pilsētas, lauku un daudzus citus tematus.

programme.title: Ralfs gatavo
programme.desc: Bērnu fantāzijai nav robežu! Un virtuvē, kurā saimnieko brālīši Ralfs un Martins, gatavošana ātri vien kļūst par izklaidi. Bagete šeit vienā mirklī pārvēršas zobenā, pūdercukurs kļūst par sniegu, no sviesta tiek būvētas piramīdas, bet no mīklas top vesels zoodārzs. Un, lai katrā sērijā uzzinātu arī kaut ko jaunu un vērtīgu par dažādiem pārtikas produktiem, puikas brauc ciemos – meklēt lielāko ķirbi, kārtīgi pasvīst zemeņu vagās, skaitīt graudiņus kukurūzas vālītēs un apciemot kaziņas. Meties šajā piedzīvojumā kopā ar mazajiem pavāriem un skaties jaunās "Ralfs gatavo" sērijas sestdienās 9:30 no rīta LTV1 un LSM bērnistabā!

Turpmāk LTV Tautas sporta sižeti būs tradicionāla "Sporta studijas" sastāvdaļa. "Sporta Studiju" vadīs rūdītie sporta žurnālisti Dāvids Ernštreits un Reinis Ošenieks, kā arī jaunās sporta žurnālistikas zvaigznes Andris Auziņš, Matīss Timofejevs un Raimonds Gekišs. "Sporta studijas" aktualitātēm sekojiet https://www.facebook.com/LTVSportaStudija

programme.title: Neatklātā Sēlija
programme.desc: Augškurzeme, Augšzeme, Sēlija – tā ir teritorija, ko apdzīvo sēļi. Daugava kā robežšķirtne, bet Sēlija - Latvijas piektā zvaigzne. Novads, kas atdzimis tikai pēc Latvijas neatkarības atgūšanas. Savā laikā bijis pie Kurzemes, vēlāk pievienots Zemgalei, bet padomju gados- pie Latgales. Šodien Sēliju atklājam no jauna. Četrās sērijās Sandijs Semjonovs kopā ar Andžeju Reiteru meklēs Sēlijas identitāti, interesantus cilvēkus, vietas, kā arī dosies piedzīvojumos. Raidījums tiks demonstrēts četras ceturtdienas pēc kārtas. Mēs viesosimies Jāņa Jaunsudrabiņa muzejā pie saimnieces Ilzes Riekstiņas, apciemosim kokmeistaru Pēteri Grauduli un rakstnieci Inesi Zanderi. Tāpat apciemosim pie appludinātā Staburaga dzīvojošo rakstnieci Māru Svīri un Inetu Timšāni, kura audzē arbūzus un melones. Būs stāsts par pensionāru krājsabiedrību Salas pagastā, kas aizdod naudu saviem pensionāriem, sēļu amatniecības centrā "Rūme"satiksim Andu Svarāni. Folkloras kopa "Dignājīši" dziedās sēļu dziesmas un cienās ar zupu, filmēsim sēļu lauku sētu, kur tiks gatavots autentisks sēļu ēdiens un tiks runāts sēļu valodā. Ciemosimies pie mūziķa Arvīda Klišāna, kurš turpat 50 gadus spēlē mežragu simfoniskajā orķestrī, ir piedalījies neskatāmos Dziesmu un deju svētkos, stāstīsim par pārceltuvi pār Daugavu, Frīdriha Stendera taku, kas izveidota kā alfabēts skolēniem (Stenders - pirmās latviešu ābeces izgudrotājs). Apkārtni izstaigāsim kopā ar Sēlijas patriotu Jāni Dmitrijevu. Ciemosimies pie aktiera Paula Butkēviča, Jaunjelgavā filmēsim vecākos ebreju kapus Latvijā. Savulaik pilsētā lielākā daļa iedzīvotāju bija ebreji. Tagad palicis viens ebreju tautības cilvēks. Dvietē filmēsim stāstu par senāko vīnogu audzētāju Latvijā - Paulu Sukatnieku. Subatē kopā ar Žaneti Jaunzemi-Grendi izstaigāsim vietas, kuras savulaik bija iemīļojis un aprakstījis Imants Ziedonis. Leišmalīte, tā viņš sauca šo apkārtni. Eglainē mēs apmeklēsim Raiņa pirmās mīlestības - Mēnesmeitiņas kapu. Kopā ar iedvesmojošu gidu tur sekos plašāks stāsts par Raiņa iemīlēšanos. Tāpat Dvietē sekos stāsts par palienu dabas parku un savvaļas ganāmpulku. Tāpat vērosim auto rallija sacīkstes, kas vietējiem ir teju reliģijas vietā. Ar vienu no zinātājiem apmeklēsim neskartu purvu (Sēliju uzskata par purvu zemi). Ar vienu no kundzēm apmeklēsim mežabrāļu bijušo bunkuru. Tā bija vieta, kurā nošāva viņas tēvu. Šī būs emocionāla un personiska saruna par Latvijas skaudro pagātni. Apmeklēsim pensionāri, kuru uzskata par slavenāko apkaimes kūku cepēju, un kopā cepsim torti. Vēl arī ciemosimies pie melnā māla meistara Mareka un kopā gatavosim podus. Ar laivu dosimies izbraucienā pa Dienvidsusēju un agri no rīta līdz ar pirmajiem saules stariem dosimies copēt Daugavā. Stāstīsim par to, kā Jaunjelgavā no vecām kleitām šuj jaunas kleitas. Apmeklēsim bērnudārzu, kur mēģina integrēt bērnus, kuri atgriezušies no ārzemēm. Apciemosim Alīdas cigoriņu kafijas ražotni.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Pāris dienu laikā Vīnē notiek divas samērā līdzīgas slepkavības - ar naža dūrieniem ir nogalināti vīrieši, kuri nesen nonākuši policijas redzeslokā izvarošanas dēļ. Izmeklētāju komandai drīz vien izdodas atrast vienojošo elementu abiem šiem gadījumiem, tomēr tas vēl nebūt nenozīmē, ka arī slepkava ir rokā. Reksis atkal ir pirmais, kas saprot, kurš ir īstais vainīgais, tikai viņam tas jādara zināms arī saviem izmeklēšanas kolēģiem.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Kādam savādam vienpatim policija atņem viņa nelegālo ieroču kolekciju, pat nenojaušot, uz ko šis cilvēks būs spējīgs pēc sava vienīgā prieka avota zaudēšanas. Aukstasinīgi tiek paveiktas vairākas slepkavības, un izmeklētājiem ir darba pilnas rokas, lai ievāktu informāciju par šo ļaundari un aizsteigtos priekšā viņa nākamajam gājienam. Šoreiz tiks apdraudēta arī Marka dzīvība, un tikai Rekša atjautīgā rīcība spēs viņu glābt.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Par godu Marka dzimšanas dienai Nikija ir nolēmusi sarīkot savam tuvajam kolēģim pārsteiguma ballīti. Diemžēl viņa pat nenojauš, ka tūdaļ kļūs par divu noziedznieku ķīlnieci. Kamēr Marks ir iesaistīts pārrunās ar šiem ļaundariem, pie Nikijas vēl ir palicis Reksis, kas labi saprot Nikijai draudošās briesmas un rīkojas gudri, lai viņa tiktu brīvībā.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Ernsts Štrobls visu mūžu ir juties nepelnīti noniecināts un ienīst savu māsu Ēriku, kura dzīvo bagātnieces dzīvi. Savu atriebību Ernsts vērš pret sievietēm, kuras līdzinās viņa māsai - blondām, skaistām un bagātām. Lai pastrādātu slepkavības, Ernsts izliekas par pastnieku, tāpēc Marka komanda sākumā aizdomās tur pastnieku, kurš uztur attiecības ar daudzām vientuļām mājsaimniecēm.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Fanefs pārmet Briāram par rakstu par Morēna operāciju. Žifāra lietas lieciniece, Dilidas kundze, tiek atrasta mirusi - nožņaugta. Lorāns un Nadja kaļ nākotnes plānus. Izabella izmeklē Veijē izvarošanas lietu un apcietina vainīgo.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Izabella izjautā Veijē kundzes dēlu Rišāru - viņai rodas aizdomas, ka dēls kaut ko slēpj. Patriks un Stefans joprojām spriež par aizturēto policistu Maksimu, kuru viņiem nekavējoties lika atlaist brīvībā, - policists daudz zināja par Nadīnes lietu...

programme.title: Izmeklētāji. Sarežģītākās slepkavību lietas
programme.desc: Šī lieta sākās 2013. gada Lieldienās, un tās galvenais inspektors bija Mārtins Branings. No rīta Kembridžšīras ugunsdzēsības dienests saņēma izsaukumu. Cilvēki bija pamanījuši degošu automašīnu Jakslijas ciemā. Tobrīd policija nenojauta, ka degošā mašīna Jakslijā ir saistīta ar daudz nopietnāku notikumu Pīterboro otrā malā, kur kāds iedzīvotājs, pastaigājoties ar suni, grāvī bija atradis līķi. Tā aizsākās lieta, kur cita pēc citas uzpeldēja arvien šokējošākas detaļas….

programme.title: Midsomeras slepkavības
programme.desc: Detektīvs Toms Bārnabijs ir pacietīgs un metodisks izmeklētājs. Viņš saprot, ka noziegumiem mazā pilsētiņā vienmēr būs sociāls raksturs, tamdēļ svarīgi izprast tās iedzīvotāju attiecības. Tikai un vienīgi viņš spēj pamanīt neskaidrus mājienus un sadzīt pēdas viltīgam slepkavam brīdī, kad nupat, šķiet, tas izbēgs nesodīts. Kad Toms Bārnabijs atgriežas mājās, viņš ir mīlošs vīrs un tēvs, tomēr, neskatoties uz to, detektīvs viņā nekad nesnauž. Citreiz vistrāpīgākās atklāsmes rodas tieši pie brokastu galda! Seriāls "Midsomeras slepkavības" ieturēts vislabākajās britu klasiskā detektīva tradīcijās: virkne aizdomās turamo, sajauktas pēdas, mīklaini mājieni, neizprotami motīvi un iespēja skatītājam pašam minēt, kurš šoreiz būs vainīgais. Seriāls veiksmīgi izrādīts teju visās Eiropas valstīs, kā arī ASV, Kanādā, Dienvidāfrikā un Tuvajos Austrumos, kopumā tas tiek uzņemts jau vairāk nekā 25 gadus.

programme.title: Juriks
programme.desc: Ceļš bez pamata zem kājām. Filma veltīta visiem Ukrainas bērniem, tās pamatā ir patiess stāsts par ukraiņu puiku, kurš vienatnē mēroja ceļu no okupētās Mariupoles līdz Ukrainas–Polijas robežai, lai satiktu savu igauņu tanti. Kara pirmajās dienās ienaidnieka apšaudē gāja bojā viņa vectēvs, tēvs un mazā māsiņa, Jurika māte nevar pamest pilsētu, jo kopj smagi slimu vecmāmiņu. Apzinoties, ka dzimtajā pilsētā dēlam draud briesmas un piespiedu izvešana uz Krieviju, māte liek viņam evakuēties. Juriks 15 dienas patstāvīgi mēro ceļu pa kara plosīto valsti, lai nonāktu drošībā pie igauņu radiem.

programme.title: Atgriešanās paradīzē
programme.desc: Londonas policijas inspektore Makenzija Klārka atgriežas dzimtajā pilsētiņā Austrālijā. Daudzi vietējie nav priecīgi, ieraugot Makenziju, un arī viņa pati vēlas pēc iespējas ātrāk tikt prom. Sevišķi neveikla ir atkalredzēšanās ar tiesu medicīnas ekspertu Glenu, kas kādreiz bijis Makenzijas līgavainis, un viņa māti Filomenu, policijas priekšnieci. Taču izrādās, ka Makenziju Londonā tik drīz vēl negaida atpakaļ un vietējai policijai vajadzīga pieredzējuša slepkavību izmeklētāja palīdzība.

programme.title: Literatūre
programme.desc: "Literatūre" ir literārā tūrisma dokumentāls raidījumu cikls, kas apskata latviešu literatūru no sendienām līdz mūsdienām. Katrā epizodē kāds latviešu rakstnieks kā ceļa karti ņem kādu sev tuva aizgājušo laiku autora grāmatu un kopā ar literatūristi Martu dodas ceļojumā uz vietām, kur tas dzīvojis vai par kurām rakstījis. Savukārt, viņu savrupais ceļabiedrs Gustavs ceļo atsevišķi ar grāmatām un meklē, kam palasīt priekšā.

programme.title: Literatūre
programme.desc: "Literatūre" ir literārā tūrisma dokumentāls raidījumu cikls, kas apskata latviešu literatūru no sendienām līdz mūsdienām. Katrā epizodē kāds latviešu rakstnieks kā ceļa karti ņem kādu sev tuva aizgājušo laiku autora grāmatu un kopā ar literatūristi Martu dodas ceļojumā uz vietām, kur tas dzīvojis vai par kurām rakstījis. Savukārt, viņu savrupais ceļabiedrs Gustavs ceļo atsevišķi ar grāmatām un meklē, kam palasīt priekšā.

programme.title: Vides fakti
programme.desc: Raidījums par norisēm dabā un apkārtējā vidē. "Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: Vai mākslas pētnieki un mūsu sabiedrība ir gatava padomju glezniecības mantojuma revīzijai? Pretrunīgi vērtētā mākslinieka Ojāra Ābola darbi skatāmi vērienīgā piemiņas izstādē. Raidījumā viesosies mākslas izstāžu kuratore un zinātniece Elita Ansone. "Kultūrdevas" otrajā daļā viesosies režisors Aiks Karapetjans un operdziedātājs Raimonds Bramanis. Latvijas Nacionālajā operā pirmizrādi piedzīvojis jauniestudējums "Zemnieka gods". Jaunajam uzvedumam pievienojot 2019. gadā inscenēto "Pajaci", operas namā skatāms spilgts divcēliens par nodevību un greizsirdību.

programme.title: Lielās patiesības
programme.desc: Sinestēzija ir sajūtas rašanās kādā maņu orgānā, kad tiek kairinātas citas maņas. Piemēram, vārdus cilvēks "dzird" krāsās, smaržās vai garšās. Psiholoģijas doktore Solvita Umbraško gan pati ir sinestēte, gan nodarbojas ar sinestēzijas zinātniskiem pētījumiem. Kā ikdienā cilvēkam izpaužas sinestēzija, vai ir kādi izaicinājumi ar to sadzīvot? Režisors Matīss Kaža Jaunajā Rīgas teātrī iestudējis lugu "Apbrīnas ieleja", kurā savijas mākslas, zinātnes un reliģijas skatījums uz sinestēziju.

programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Tas, kas ģimenei ir foto albums, tas medijam ir arhīvs. Latvijas Televīzijai tas ir tik bagātīgs! Tāpat kā ģimene pulcējas kopīgos sadraudzības stāstos pie ģimenes albuma, Latvijas Televīzijai ir gods un prieks pulcināt kopā tos, kas šo arhīvu ir veidojuši cauri gadiem, un viņu dzimšanas dienā ieskatītos arhīvos, mūsu kopīgajā kultūrvēsturē.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programme.desc: Shrouded by mystery, the Lost Treasures of Egypt clears the sand away from your eyes in revealing the secrets of this Ancient Civilisation. From the Valley of Kings to the Pyramids of Giza, we uncover hidden tombs and foretell the stories of ruling pharaohs through the artefacts, that we find along the way. Following the excavations of international experts, we unearth historical context at various archaeological sites. At the end of this series, you should be enlightened with numerous Egyptian theories such as "mummification" and the Curse of the Afterlife. With royalty as Tutankhamun and Cleopatra, we explore the impacts these figures had at the time and the lasting dynasty they have since left behind, for modern Egypt.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: With airplane travel becoming increasingly popular in a shrinking world and millions of passengers journeying this way every day, it is helpful to be aware of the potentail dangers involved. This show presents remarkable stories of some of the most catastrophic accidents in aviation history and investigates the causes of the accidents, what effect they had on the industry and the steps taken to ensure that they dont happen in the future. Each stand-alone episode features compelling re-enactments, expert analysis and interviews with those involved. The explanations for the accidents range from the explosive power of decompression to problems with autopilots and computerised control systems to air traffic control errors.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: With airplane travel becoming increasingly popular in a shrinking world and millions of passengers journeying this way every day, it is helpful to be aware of the potentail dangers involved. This show presents remarkable stories of some of the most catastrophic accidents in aviation history and investigates the causes of the accidents, what effect they had on the industry and the steps taken to ensure that they dont happen in the future. Each stand-alone episode features compelling re-enactments, expert analysis and interviews with those involved. The explanations for the accidents range from the explosive power of decompression to problems with autopilots and computerised control systems to air traffic control errors.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Plane Crash Recreated Plane Crash Recreated 10 x 60 As passengers, every time we board an aeroplane, we place our trust in the pilot, airline and the aircraft manufacturer and while flying remains the safest form of travel, accidents still happen. Plane Crash Recreated will explain and investigate the worlds most infamous plane crashes. Using survivor stories, expert interviews and black-box data, we will experience the final harrowing moments on board these notorious flights. But could the outcome have been different? Using a team of highly skilled test pilots and our own cutting edge flight simulator, we show you the extreme pressure inside the cockpit. When faced with failure, our military, commercial, aerobatic and test-pilots will need to make split-second life-or-death decisions. How will their vastly different training affect their outcome? And with the benefit of hindsight, what would they do differently?

programme.title: No Taste Like Home with Antoni Porowski
programme.desc: Antoni takes Issa to her fathers homeland of Senegal, where they uncover ancestral stories of powerful women and royal connections. Through this culinary journey, Issa learns more about her familys epic history and how it all relates to her own identity.

programme.title: No Taste Like Home with Antoni Porowski
programme.desc: Antoni takes Henry to Borneo, where they unearth family stories and taste their way to a deeper connection with Henrys mothers Iban heritage. As they cook with long-lost family and newfound friends, Henry learns that genealogy in this oral tradition is about far more than storytelling.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. Each week we show between 50 and 60 clips of misadventure - ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes. Each episode will feature several themes such as motorbike drifting, wakeboarding or attempting to fly drones. Clips are paused, re-wound, and re-played as we analyse exactly what went wrong and why. Richard Hammond explains the physics, chemistry and biology at play, by presenting forensic detail to explain the stupidity that resulted in failure. Hell study everything from acceleration to aero dynamics, fluid pressure to combustion and human anatomy to flammability. This is misadventure explained. This is The Science of Stupid.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. In this episode we learn just how many ways there are to embarrass, injure and humiliate yourself when BASE jumping, pulling a BMX nose wheelie and showing off your sword skills.

programme.title: Supercar Megabuild
programme.desc: Returning for an epic second series, expert mechanics Shane and Dan take supercars and engineer them to the max! This series will see Maseratis going 200 mile an hour in Le Mans, an Audi R8 enter the Gymkhana Grid, and a Porsche turned into an ice-rally roadster. Alongside there will be Bentleys in the desert, Jaguars racing Spitfires and even an off-roading transporter carrying a Lamborghini. SuperCar MegaBuild: Even perfection can be perfected!

programme.title: Supercar Megabuild
programme.desc: Returning for an epic second series, expert mechanics Shane and Dan take supercars and engineer them to the max! This series will see Maseratis going 200 mile an hour in Le Mans, an Audi R8 enter the Gymkhana Grid, and a Porsche turned into an ice-rally roadster. Alongside there will be Bentleys in the desert, Jaguars racing Spitfires and even an off-roading transporter carrying a Lamborghini. SuperCar MegaBuild: Even perfection can be perfected!

programme.title: Ultimate Supercar
programme.desc: A must see for petrolheads and connoisseurs, this series takes the viewer behind the scenes at some of the most legendary automobile manufacturers on the planet to reveal how their supercars are designed, engineered and constructed. From the DBS Superleggera of the last truly independent marque, Aston Marton, to Ferraris best-selling Portofino and from rappers favourite, the Bentley Continental GT. to the over-the-top Lamborghini Aventador SVJ, we learn what makes these beautiful machines unique and how it is the small, individual engineering secrets that make all the difference and ensure their mythical status and economic success.

programme.title: Ultimate Supercar
programme.desc: A must see for petrolheads and connoisseurs, this series takes the viewer behind the scenes at some of the most legendary automobile manufacturers on the planet to reveal how their supercars are designed, engineered and constructed. From the DBS Superleggera of the last truly independent marque, Aston Marton, to Ferraris best-selling Portofino and from rappers favourite, the Bentley Continental GT. to the over-the-top Lamborghini Aventador SVJ, we learn what makes these beautiful machines unique and how it is the small, individual engineering secrets that make all the difference and ensure their mythical status and economic success.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Chris Hemsworth: a Road Trip to Remember
programme.desc: In his most personal documentary yet, Chris turns the camera on his own family after his dads recent Alzheimers diagnosis. They embark on a road trip into their past, exploring the science of social connection and how it can support memory function. They revisit meaningful places and faces, capturing it all as a home movie, and reviving treasured recollections.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Locked in the depths of winter, Margot hits the trapping trail - on the hunt for precious fur-bearing resources; Determined to thrive in the frigid Northwoods, Billy tries his hand at building a hot water heating system. Matty makes some serious "comfort" upgrades to his recently expanded Newfoundland abode; And taking a break from cabin construction, Emilie and Gilbert turn their attention to securing a traditional and essential food source.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Spring has arrived and Margot heads out, in search of bear - but ends up face to face with an even more formidable force of nature. Billy takes advantage of warmer weather and begins work on some much-needed cabin upgrades. Matty goes full "hillbilly" with his plans for the ultimate backwoods deep freeze; And Emilie and Gilbert get to work on a "Shabotwan" - a traditional structure they to hope to finish before the spring goose hunt begins.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot and her canine friends continue their pioneering trapping adventure, pushing deeper into the rugged Yukon backcountry. Desperate for building materials for his island homestead, Matty takes to the seas in search of timber. Billy turns his attention to fixing one of the most essential of all backwoods buildings: the outhouse. Emilie and Gilbert take their daughter Annie on her first hunting trip.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Plane Crash Recreated Plane Crash Recreated 10 x 60 As passengers, every time we board an aeroplane, we place our trust in the pilot, airline and the aircraft manufacturer and while flying remains the safest form of travel, accidents still happen. Plane Crash Recreated will explain and investigate the worlds most infamous plane crashes. Using survivor stories, expert interviews and black-box data, we will experience the final harrowing moments on board these notorious flights. But could the outcome have been different? Using a team of highly skilled test pilots and our own cutting edge flight simulator, we show you the extreme pressure inside the cockpit. When faced with failure, our military, commercial, aerobatic and test-pilots will need to make split-second life-or-death decisions. How will their vastly different training affect their outcome? And with the benefit of hindsight, what would they do differently?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. Unraveling the complex mystery is a painstaking process that takes months—and sometimes years—of detective work. The twisted wreckage at the crash site tells part of the story; investigators can use it to learn about the final seconds of a flight and rule out mechanical failures. The flight data and cockpit voice recorders are critical, but they dont always reveal what happened. It almost always takes a tragic combination of factors to bring down an airplane.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: With airplane travel becoming increasingly popular in a shrinking world and millions of passengers journeying this way every day, it is helpful to be aware of the potentail dangers involved. This show presents remarkable stories of some of the most catastrophic accidents in aviation history and investigates the causes of the accidents, what effect they had on the industry and the steps taken to ensure that they dont happen in the future. Each stand-alone episode features compelling re-enactments, expert analysis and interviews with those involved. The explanations for the accidents range from the explosive power of decompression to problems with autopilots and computerised control systems to air traffic control errors.

programme.title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
programme.desc: The final leg of Wills 100-day adventure is his most dangerous mission yet: an expedition to dive under the ice at the North Pole to help polar ecologist Allison Fong capture world-first scientific samples. But when a snowstorm and mechanical failure put the mission in crisis, Will learns what it takes to be a hero in real life.

programme.title: Pole to Pole with Will Smith
programme.desc: Will struggles in bone-chilling winds in the South Pole, where temperatures can drop below -100°F. He skis, treks and climbs across giant icefields and cliffs with the support of one of the worlds best polar athletes, Richard Parks. In one of the planets most isolated research stations, scientists take ice cores deep under the surface and make incredible sacrifices to pursue their research.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot and her canine friends continue their pioneering trapping adventure, pushing deeper into the rugged Yukon backcountry. Desperate for building materials for his island homestead, Matty takes to the seas in search of timber. Billy turns his attention to fixing one of the most essential of all backwoods buildings: the outhouse. Emilie and Gilbert take their daughter Annie on her first hunting trip.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: As temperatures plunge, Margot looks to her dogs to help her seriously raise her wood-harvesting game. Emilie and Gilbert travel to a remote, frozen lake, hoping to net a haul of food for their family. Yearning to bring a little more light into his backwoods life, Billy begins work on an off-grid power system, and Matty heads indoors to complete the latest and perhaps greatest of all his "Hillbilly" building projects.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: The shroud of Turin is one of the most debated archaeological artifacts in the world. Is it the burial cloth of the Christian messiah, Jesus of Nazareth, or is it an elaborate fake? Every time the evidence points one way or another, a credible counter argument is raised. In the collective imagination of the mid-20th century, jetpacks were the personalized transportation of the future. American engineer Wendell Moore really did develop and test a model for the military, so why dont we all have one? Buried for 2,400 years, a pair of beautiful cups are discovered in a grave mound made by Scythians, an ancient civilization of the Caucasus Mountains. What can the cups be for if they have holes in the bottom? And why are they solid gold?

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: Outside Draskow, Poland, an undocumented cemetery hundreds of years old is found in 2010 containing a womans skeleton with a blade on her stomach, a stone on her neck and a green color in her mouth. Was this strange burial a precaution against the living dead? During the cold war, the United States developed a surveillance tool that was the first of its kind—code name: Project Corona. Did the shiny golden dome really help avert nuclear Armageddon? Countless literati have studied Shakespeares plays for his profound prose, but what about for secret-coded messages? In the 1800s, Dr. Orville Ward Owen built a hulking wooden machine to do just that and concluded that Shakespeare was not who we think. Does his theory stand up to scrutiny?

programme.title: UFO Europe: Untold Stories
programme.desc: 8th September 1970: the height of the Cold War. American pilot Capt. Schaffner is scrambled to intercept an unidentified target over the North Sea and disappears without trace. When his aircraft is discovered, the cockpit is closed but his body has vanished. In 2004, in a small fishing village on the island of Sicily, a series of unexplained incidents take place… one after another. A fisherman witnesses a mysterious, unidentified, red light that flies up from the water. Other local residents also report UFOs sightings in the area. But the UFO sightings were just the start of a bizarre and frightening set of events that took place in and around the village of Canneto di Caronia. RAF Pilot, Sargent Hughes encounters an UFO on a routine training flight over Germany in 1952. Despite flying with three other planes he is the only one to witness the object. His colleagues mock him and dismiss his sighting as a flight of fancy, as a joke they paint a flying saucer on his aeroplane saying "Saucer Sam".

programme.title: UFO Europe: Untold Stories
programme.desc: On August 18, 1985, 4 civilian pilots are flying back from an air show when they notice a silver missile shaped object coming towards them and passing underneath their plane. They turn around and try to keep up with the object but it is too fast for them. They report the sighting, but no conclusive answers were found. On January 8th, 1981, a man working in a field reported seeing a strange object land in his field. Shortly afterwards, the object took off. He noticed marks on the ground where he thought the object had landed and decided to report what he had seen. Despite investigations, no definite explanation was reached. From late 1989 to Spring 1990, thousands of people across Belgium reported sightings of 3 lights in a triangular formation, moving across the sky. The lights were seen over cities and in the countryside, and even sparked a scramble of Air Force F-16 jets to investigate.

programme.title: Chasing UFOs
programme.desc: This time Ryder, Ben, and James head to the Colorado Rockies to inspect claims of animal mutilations and reports of abductions. These instances take place San Luis Valley, a town with decades of history involving UFO sightings. Residents are eager to share their encounters with the team - everything from hovering green lights to speeding saucers. After spotting a few questionable lights in the night sky, Ryder, Ben, and James meet with local ranchers to learn further about the animal mutilations. They also meet a man who claims he was abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Matty goes full "hillbilly" with his plans for the ultimate backwoods deep freeze; And Emilie and Gilbert get to work on a "Shabotwan" - a traditional structure they to hope to finish before the spring goose hunt begins.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. In this episode we learn just how many ways there are to embarrass, injure and humiliate yourself when BASE jumping, pulling a BMX nose wheelie and showing off your sword skills.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. Each week we show between 50 and 60 clips of misadventure - ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes. Each episode will feature several themes such as motorbike drifting, wakeboarding or attempting to fly drones. Clips are paused, re-wound, and re-played as we analyse exactly what went wrong and why. Richard Hammond explains the physics, chemistry and biology at play, by presenting forensic detail to explain the stupidity that resulted in failure. Hell study everything from acceleration to aero dynamics, fluid pressure to combustion and human anatomy to flammability. This is misadventure explained. This is The Science of Stupid.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz have taken on the task of restoring a 1974 Mk1 Ford Capri. Its owner, 53 year old Helen, is a lifelong petrol head who bought her dream car nearly 8 years ago with the plan to strip it down and do full nut and bolt rebuild. However after a terrible accident Helen was left with heart problems and in constant pain from severe rheumatoid arthritis the restoration of her Capri was put on hold. Daughter Rebecca and son Rob called Car SOS help put their mothers car back on the road and the gleam back in her eye.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on 63 year old Kels 1962 Triumph TR4. Kel bought his beloved British roadster back in the 1970s and it became the car of his youth, he simply couldnt be parted from it - even when it finally gave up the ghost and ended up in storage - it was never far from his thoughts. His planned restoration sadly ground to a halt when a series of family tragedies and a brutal stroke that robbed him of most of his vision - meant that any plans to get his car back on the road were dashed. Tim and Fuzz steal the car away but quickly realise that theyve taken on one of the biggest jobs in Car SOS history.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz travel to Northern Ireland to take on a 1972 Generation 1 Toyota Celica a rare Japanese coupe that has seen better days. The cars owner is 50 year old Celica obsessive Noel who bought the car with a plan to restore it and use it as his daily driver. However Noels whole life took a turn for the worse when he suffered a series of spinal injuries that lost him his job, his home and put his dream car restoration on hold for good.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Master mechanics Fuzz Townshend and parts-blagging petrol head Tim Shaw are back for a brand new season of the fan favourite show Car S.O.S. The comedy duo have their work-cut out as they embark on more undercover missions rescuing classic cars and returning them in a surprise reveal to their much deserving owners. This season starts with a exhaust bang, as Tim and Fuzz are on a special mission to rescue a unique classic racing car and reunite it with a true racing legend...Sir Stirling Moss! But this 1962 Austin Healy Sebring Sprite, that once raced in a team that included Sir Stirling Moss, isnt in a fit state. But the guys have a plan to get this car back on the racetrack and Sir Stirling Moss back in the driving seat. Fuzz begins work in the garage whilst Tim goes in search of the original engine, and also finding time along the way to have a sit down with the racing legend himself. Will the Sprite be ready in time for Sir Stirling Moss to take it out for a spin? The guys also come across a supercar thats begging to be taken back to the swinging 60s, the Jaguar E-type. But the cars owner Mick is suffering from osteoporosis and has lost all hope that his beloved car will ever be back to its full glory. But Tim and Fuzz are working with Micks family in secret to restore the car and give Mick a brilliant surprise. But when they discover its a back to metal restoration this car looks like its going to be more of a head-ache than a head-turner. Other cars festering away waiting for the guys attention are Tims all-time favourite: the Audi Quattro Turbo, the 3 wheeled 1934 Morgan F4, a retro 1982 Mk1 GTI and a 1995 Nissan Skyline GTR. So start up those engines, as Tim and Fuzz return this month for the ultimate car show with a heart.

programme.title: Lost in the Jungle
programme.desc: A deadly plane crash deep in the Colombian rainforest strands four young siblings to survive 40 unimaginable days alone. For the first time, the children tell their story, revealing their epic fight to stay alive as a dramatic rescue mission unfolds around them, uniting Indigenous trackers and the military in a race against time in this gripping true story of survival, courage and hope.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Gladiators: Warriors of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Emperor Commodus shocks Rome by casting aside tradition and becoming a gladiator. Over 14 days of extravagant games, he slays wild beasts, spars with helpless opponents, and indulges his fantasy of godhood - dressed as Hercules, demanding adoration. Behind the spectacle lies growing discontent: the Senate scorned, the treasury drained, and power abused, as he trains as a gladiator in his country estate. When Commodus plans to inaugurate the new year from the gladiators barracks, his inner circle panics. Poisoned by his mistress Marcia and strangled by his trainer Narcissus, Commodus dies; a far cry from the hero he imagined. His death sparks civil war, ushering in the Severan dynasty. His legacy is condemned, and Commodus remains one of the most bizarre figures in Roman history, an emperor who tried to rule from the arena, not the throne.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru and Brazil
programme.desc: This season features four episodes each at two of Latin Americas biggest airports: Lima, Perus Jorge Chavez and Brazils S?o Paulo-Guarulhos. Police are on high alert. Their main challenges: illegal immigration and the trafficking of cocaine. From hidden compartments and ingested capsules to fake documents, officers work 24/7 to protect their borders and stop criminals in their tracks. Watch the action from behind the scenes.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Lima, Perus airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest threat: cocaine smuggling. A US citizen is caught with cocaine - and her story doesnt add up. A woman with cocaine in her suitcase comes clean and a police sting nets another suspect. A Japanese karaoke star is carrying more than music. A carrier implicates her mom. A false positive.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Turkish Airlines Flight 1951 was less than a mile from the runway at Amsterdam Schiphol Airport when it catastrophically crashed on 25 February 2009. The aircraft broke into three pieces on impact, killing nine passengers and crew and all three pilots. A faulty radio altimeter was the initial catalyst in a chain of errors that led to the horrific crash. In this episode, survivors tell their story of escaping from the wreckage of what should have been a normal commute home to Amsterdam..

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: The simplest mistakes are at the heart of some of the worst airline accidents, and while commercial pilots undergo hundreds of hours of training and testing, even experienced pilots can make deadly rookie errors. A botched takeoff in Buenos Aires kills 60 people and the cause stuns investigators. Just two months after 9/11, American Airlines Flight 587 crashes in Queens, New York, igniting fears that America is once again under attack. And, when Continental Airlines 3407 stalls above Buffalo, the flight crews baffling reaction proves fatal.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Drawing the attention of the entire world, three fatal design flaws put air crash investigators in a storm of controversy. When one of former race car driver Niki Laudas planes nosedives into a Thai jungle, a one-in-a-million failure reveals a weak spot in every Boeing 767. A piece of the plane blows off a Turkish Airlines DC-10 causing the most catastrophic mid-air emergency of its time. And, a risky test flight is the only way to uncover the startling truth about what brought down Atlantic Southeast Airlines Flight 2311.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Angkor: Ancient Laos Revealed
programme.desc: An international team of archaeologists investigate a hoard of priceless ancient treasure discovered in the southeast Asian nation of Laos. Their mission takes them to temple sites in the jungle. Aerial scanning technology targets new areas for excavation where astonishing new discoveries are made as they as they explore the origins of the civilisation that built the great city of Angkor.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Angkor: Ancient Laos Revealed
programme.desc: A team of archaeologists investigate a priceless hoard of ancient treasure discovered in Laos. Their quest takes them to temple sites in the southeast Asian jungle as they try to find out who the stunning treasure belonged to and what it was used for. Astonishing new discoveries of gold and human remains open a window into the early years of the civilisation that built the great city of Angkor.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programme.desc: Shrouded by mystery, the Lost Treasures of Egypt clears the sand away from your eyes in revealing the secrets of this Ancient Civilisation. From the Valley of Kings to the Pyramids of Giza, we uncover hidden tombs and foretell the stories of ruling pharaohs through the artefacts, that we find along the way. Following the excavations of international experts, we unearth historical context at various archaeological sites. At the end of this series, you should be enlightened with numerous Egyptian theories such as "mummification" and the Curse of the Afterlife. With royalty as Tutankhamun and Cleopatra, we explore the impacts these figures had at the time and the lasting dynasty they have since left behind, for modern Egypt.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programme.desc: Shrouded by mystery, the Lost Treasures of Egypt clears the sand away from your eyes in revealing the secrets of this Ancient Civilisation. From the Valley of Kings to the Pyramids of Giza, we uncover hidden tombs and foretell the stories of ruling pharaohs through the artefacts, that we find along the way. Following the excavations of international experts, we unearth historical context at various archaeological sites. At the end of this series, you should be enlightened with numerous Egyptian theories such as "mummification" and the Curse of the Afterlife. With royalty as Tutankhamun and Cleopatra, we explore the impacts these figures had at the time and the lasting dynasty they have since left behind, for modern Egypt.

programme.title: Secrets of Christs Tomb: Explorer Special
programme.desc: In this 60 minute Nat Geo Explorer Special, we follow world leading experts on a quest to unlock the mysteries surrounding the Tomb of Christ. At the heart of the story a team of leading scientists use the latest scientific techniques to restore the edicule housing the tomb. Scientific tests indicate the remnants of the tomb dates to 4th century - a discovery that could revolutionise what we know about the tomb of Christ.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Ignoring common sense and reason, people continue to believe in a host of supposed "supernatural phenomena". In a brand new series, National Geographic Channel exposes the myths and malarkey behind these enduring modern-day tales of the unexpected.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: He terrorized the streets of Londons East End for three months in the autumn of 1888. He did this by killing, and then butchering, five women… at least. This brief murder spree earned the killer the grand daddy of all nicknames. That name, and the grotesque way he dispatched his victims has made Jack the Ripper the most notorious serial killer of all time. But no one knows who he was. In the years since the Ripper plied his grisly trade, the search for his identity has practically become a cottage industry. And its still going on. But is the search getting any closer to the truth? Some people believe the answer is yes. Crime writer Patricia Cornwell has peaked the worlds interest, and animosity, with her new book on the Rippers identity. Like almost everyone who has studied Jack the Ripper, Cornwell has a theory about who he was. The evidence she has amassed points to a prominent British artist named Walter Sickert, who was 28 at the time of the murders, and seemed to take an unusual interest in them. Sickerts artwork is macabre, his relationship with women dubious, and his childhood ripe for Freudian analysis. But can any of this prove he was a serial killer of prostitutes? For this, Cornwell points to the largest body of physical evidence remaining in the Ripper case: the hundreds of letters written to police during the time of the murders, supposedly by the murderer himself. Cornwell believes the letters tell a story - not just through their words, but also in the way those words were formed, the paper they were written on, and the sketches in the margins. She believes some of the letters are the work of Walter Sickert, and well talk to the paper and art conservators and handwriting analysts who are scouring the letters for clues. Meanwhile, other theories about the Rippers identity abound. We visit the murder sites with Ivor Edwards, a professional criminal turned amateur sleuth, who believes Jack the Ripper was a black magic occultist. Edwards reveals a pattern to the crimes that he believes incriminates suspect Robert Donston Stephenson, who may have killed his victims at strategic points on a map in order to desecrate the Christian cross. If Edwards theory sounds far-fetched, it isnt the first. There is also the Freemason angle - pointing to similarities between the ritualistic nature of the murders and ancient Masonic rites. And conspiracy theories flourish, even including the royal family. Can any of the theories hold true? Was Jack the Ripper an iconic artist, a black magic occultist, a member of the royal family, or just an anonymous ""Jack Doe"", whose name is lost to history? Ripperologists, forensic psychologists, crime experts and scientists investigate the clues in search of the Rippers identity.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru and Brazil
programme.desc: This season features four episodes each at two of Latin Americas biggest airports: Lima, Perus Jorge Chavez and Brazils S?o Paulo-Guarulhos. Police are on high alert. Their main challenges: illegal immigration and the trafficking of cocaine. From hidden compartments and ingested capsules to fake documents, officers work 24/7 to protect their borders and stop criminals in their tracks. Watch the action from behind the scenes.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Lima, Perus airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest threat: cocaine smuggling. A US citizen is caught with cocaine - and her story doesnt add up. A woman with cocaine in her suitcase comes clean and a police sting nets another suspect. A Japanese karaoke star is carrying more than music. A carrier implicates her mom. A false positive.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The Amber Room is one of the worlds most valuable lost art treasures. Stolen by the Nazis and kept in a castle on the Baltic coast, it vanished in the brutal last months of the war. Today the new discovery of a shipwreck holding a large secret cargo leads explorers to the heart of the mystery, and reveals a forgotten tragedy of 1945: the largest sea evacuation in history, dwarfing Dunkirk in size.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Turkish Airlines Flight 1951 was less than a mile from the runway at Amsterdam Schiphol Airport when it catastrophically crashed on 25 February 2009. The aircraft broke into three pieces on impact, killing nine passengers and crew and all three pilots. A faulty radio altimeter was the initial catalyst in a chain of errors that led to the horrific crash. In this episode, survivors tell their story of escaping from the wreckage of what should have been a normal commute home to Amsterdam..

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Lion Air Flight 610 was just 13 minutes into flight from Jakarta, Indonesia, when it plunged into the sea on 29 October 2018. This was the first fatal aviation accident for the 737 MAX, killing all 189 people on board. Just five months later, tragedy struck again on 10 March 2019, when the 737 Max serving Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302, crashed approximately six minutes after takeoff from Ethiopia, again killing all passengers and crew. What followed was an intense investigation into what caused these two devastating crashes. In this episode former NTSB investigators talk us through how these tragedies could have been avoided..

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: Life in the African bush is a game of survival, for both hunter and hunted. Add babies to the mix and youll see astounding feats of courage as mothers risk life and limb to protect their young. In spring, tall grass helps babies hide out of sight, but it also camouflages predators on the prowl. This game drive captures extraordinary behaviour as families and individuals battle to eat, defend, and raise young.

programme.title: Alaskas Deadliest: Predator Prowl
programme.desc: Alaskas deadliest predators fight to survive in one of Americas last wild frontiers. When winter breaks, carnivores clash on Alaskas waterways and wide-open spaces to make the most of the endless sunshine. The shores along its open ocean create a path for giant hunters like orcas, salmon sharks, and walrus. Inland, wolverines chase prey with ferocious intensity. Bears reap the benefits of brutal ocean kills along the coastline and waterways.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: The great outdoors: fresh air, beautiful forests and incredible wildlife. But if you go down to the woods today, be prepared for every kind of surprise. From bears crashing picnics to cougars chasing trail runners, the animals that call this place home can be wild! Take a hike into the wilderness to discover how to avoid a run-in with a bison and when to duck if you see a deer.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: Soon two-thirds of the global population will be living in cities, leaving wild animals to develop a whole new set of street smarts. Whether thats a hungry bear raiding a supermarket, a street gang of monkeys committing daylight robbery, or a raccoon figuring out how to open a wildlife-proof bin - from Delhi to New York, these guys will stop at nothing.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: Safaris are a great way to meet some of the planets most iconic animals, but sometimes, the wildlife gets a little too close for comfort. From a lion invading a tent to a testosterone-fueled elephant charging down a truck, its no wonder these clips go viral. Buckle up for a wild ride to discover why these animals are just doing what comes naturally.

programme.title: Race to Winter
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. As the first light of spring touches snow-covered landscapes, the race begins. Across fjords, forests, mountains and tundra, animals emerge from hiding to take advantage of summers fleeting generosity.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind

programme.title: Race to Winter
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. As the first light of spring touches snow-covered landscapes, the race begins. Across fjords, forests, mountains and tundra, animals emerge from hiding to take advantage of summers fleeting generosity.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild

When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: With leopards in its mountains, blue whales off its coasts, and foxes roaming its city centres, Europe is a continent full of wild surprises. From the frozen glaciers of Iceland to the lush islands of the Azores, and from the rugged peaks of the Caucasus to the metropolis of London, the first episode in this stunning series highlights Europes astonishing diversity, all shot with breath-taking brio and the latest technology to reveal the continent and its animals in all its breath-taking glory.

programme.title: Wild Lapland
programme.desc: A lyrical portrayal of the enchanting, wild creatures who call Lapland home.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Mountains. Europes mountains may offer incredible views, but they are rarely an easy place to live. Faced with rugged landscapes and extreme weather conditions, Europes high-altitude animals must either adapt... or die trying.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Europe is a continent of diversity, and its coasts are no exception. From the frozen Arctic Ocean, where polar bears and reindeer battle for survival, to the warm beaches of the Mediterranean, home to pink flamingos and killer corals, Europes coastline attracts a staggering array of wildlife. Its also the setting for some of the worlds most jaw-dropping natural spectacles, including orcas and humpback whales hunting side by side, and wild horses running free on the beaches of the Camargue.

programme.title: Wild Lapland
programme.desc: A lyrical portrayal of the enchanting, wild creatures who call Lapland home.

programme.title: Snow School
programme.desc: When every day is a snow day, school is always in session! Snowy climates can make for harsh living, and adulting is hard no matter where you are, but these young are flourishing; a baby walrus gets a swim lesson from Mom, young stoats playtime teaches them how to hunt, otter pups take a slide and learn to avoid predators, and owlets practice leaving the nest. Well also see penguin chicks daring to take the leap, an unlikely team of mismatched teenagers, and others learning how to weather and thrive in the coldest climates, thanks to their snowy homeschooling, some very dedicated parents, and a lot of trial and error.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: Reality show follows Dutch-born veterinarian Jan Pol, his family and employees everyday. Jan Pol and his wife Diane started their own practice in Weidman, Michigan, Pol Veterinary Services, back in in 1981. Dr Pol takes a good care of every family pet and head of livestock no matter what size or condition and is a true legend in the community. Dr Pol has seen it all, treating numerous patients every single day, his daily routine is more than 12 hours but nothing can stop him from being devoted to his patients.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol

Dr Pol has seen it all, treating numerous patients every single day, his daily routine is more than 12 hours but nothing can stop him from being devoted to his patients.

programme.title: Wild Mississippi
programme.desc: North Americas most famous waterway, the Mississippi River, is explored in this fantastic documentary series, focussing on the vast numbers of animals that depend on it for survival. With stunning cinematography that highlights its beauty and size, Wild Mississippi reveals the diverse climates and landscapes this enormous waterway covers, with its basin stretching for thousands of miles. A three-part series, each episode focusses on a unique aspect of the river, whether its the cold, frozen birth as it falls south from the northern states, the floods it causes, both beneficial and detrimental to animals and humans alike, as well as its negative effects, such as the masses of fertiliser it carries into the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdom
programme.desc: Instead of providing in-depth examinations of the fauna of the continent of Africa, this nature series alternatively focuses on the hostile and unforgiving landscapes that the animals have to survive in. Africa is home to some of the most extreme and diverse environments on the planet, from arid deserts to lush rainforests, mountainous peaks to mighty river and lake systems, savannah grasslands to rugged coastline. This show explores these different regions and documents how the plants and creatures that inhabit them endure places where there are few resources of food and water or where competition is rife and life-threatening. The unique demands placed on these plants and animals have resulted in the development of incredibly resilient species that remain successful against all the odds.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: This stunning six-part nature series tells the inspiring story of the rebirthing of the wild regions of the continent of Europe. A land formerly full of diverse wildlife and contrasting landscapes, Europe was in need of special rewilding teams to embark on a mission to return species to their natural habitat and this series focuses on six regions that have benefitted from the project. The Carpathian Mountains of Romania have seen the reintroduction of European bison while rural depopulation in Spain and Portugal offers up the opportunity to expand the wild nature of the Iberian Peninsula. The teams also look at how bears and humans can live peacefully, side by side and explores the myriad creatures that call the Danube Delta home. The unique culture and atmosphere of Lapland plays host to distinctive wildlife and the Sámi people and a natural balance is being restored to the Balkans.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: After 30 years of war and destruction, Gorongosa National Park in Mozambique has undergone a remarkable restoration.

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdom

programme.title: Polar Worlds with Bertie Gregory Mashup
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmaker Bertie Gregory travels to the gateways to the poles to film wildlife in two of the harshest environments on the planet: South Georgia Island above Antarctica, and Canadas frigid North below the Arctic Circle. Surviving in these vastly different environments require cunning, persistence and the ability to adapt to a changing climate. This is the story of Berties quest to capture these wild environments firsthand.

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdom
programme.desc: Instead of providing in-depth examinations of the fauna of the continent of Africa, this nature series alternatively focuses on the hostile and unforgiving landscapes that the animals have to survive in. Africa is home to some of the most extreme and diverse environments on the planet, from arid deserts to lush rainforests, mountainous peaks to mighty river and lake systems, savannah grasslands to rugged coastline. This show explores these different regions and documents how the plants and creatures that inhabit them endure places where there are few resources of food and water or where competition is rife and life-threatening. The unique demands placed on these plants and animals have resulted in the development of incredibly resilient species that remain successful against all the odds.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds assembles "The Superzeros", a team of somewhat pitiful animals with unexpectedly awesome superpowers.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Terrible Parents. Ryan Reynolds reveals some highly questionable parenting strategies from the animal kingdoms worst parents, the underdogs, from a goose who lays their eggs on the top of a cliff to a koala that feeds its baby poop.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds puts the spotlight on the underdogs who get ahead by sneaky tactics.

programme.title: Underdogs

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: Reality show follows Dutch-born veterinarian Jan Pol, his family and employees everyday. Jan Pol and his wife Diane started their own practice in Weidman, Michigan, Pol Veterinary Services, back in in 1981. Dr Pol takes a good care of every family pet and head of livestock no matter what size or condition and is a true legend in the community. Dr Pol has seen it all, treating numerous patients every single day, his daily routine is more than 12 hours but nothing can stop him from being devoted to his patients.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: This stunning six-part nature series tells the inspiring story of the rebirthing of the wild regions of the continent of Europe. A land formerly full of diverse wildlife and contrasting landscapes, Europe was in need of special rewilding teams to embark on a mission to return species to their natural habitat and this series focuses on six regions that have benefitted from the project. The Carpathian Mountains of Romania have seen the reintroduction of European bison while rural depopulation in Spain and Portugal offers up the opportunity to expand the wild nature of the Iberian Peninsula. The teams also look at how bears and humans can live peacefully, side by side and explores the myriad creatures that call the Danube Delta home. The unique culture and atmosphere of Lapland plays host to distinctive wildlife and the Sámi people and a natural balance is being restored to the Balkans.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls ar komandu pārvācas uz Celtnieklīci, kur viņi dzīvo, spēlējas un būvē visu, kas vien nepieciešams.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Vecmamma rāda Dorai fotoalbumu ar putnu bildēm. Tomēr albumā vēl trūkst Fiksadū fotogrāfijas. Dora apņemas atrast un nofotografēt ašo putnu. Dora un Zābaciņš palīdz papagailēnam atgriezties mājās - taču ceļā putnēns nebeidz mēdīties!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais uztvēris melodiju no Marsa. Barbapapas būvē raķeti, lai dotos uz sarkano planētu. Ceļā uz Marsu Barbapapas sastop Barbamarsiešu ģimeni. Viņiem nav laika iepazīties, kad ciemam uzbrūk milzu augs.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais uztvēris melodiju no Marsa. Barbapapas būvē raķeti, lai dotos uz sarkano planētu. Ceļā uz Marsu Barbapapas sastop Barbamarsiešu ģimeni. Viņiem nav laika iepazīties, kad ciemam uzbrūk milzu augs.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbamazuļi atrod ziloņu mazuli un slepeni par to rūpējas. Kā Barbatētis un Barbamamma reaģēs uz Borisu? Zilonis Boriss ilgojas pēc mājām. Barbapapas nolemj vest viņu atpakaļ uz Āfriku. Turpat viņi palīdz Borisam pielāgoties.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Kamēr ģimene veido keramikas izstrādājumus, Barbabravo un Barbagudrais mēģina uzstādīt pasaules rekordu ar siera suflē. Barbapapas nolemj doties uz parku. Kamēr brālis un māsa spēlējas, Barbaliba mēģina visu kontrolēt.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad stirnai Podziņai jāšķērso Celtnieklīča lidostas skrejceļš, Rabls un komanda zina, kas jābūvē. Rabls un komanda uzbūvē milzu skrituļdēli tantes Celtnes un Rivera šovam. Taču, kad tas zaudē kontroli, suņiem jādzenas pakaļ!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcim vajadzīga pasta nodaļa! Bet, kad celtni apsēž vāveres, suņiem jāizdomā risinājums. Rabla komanda izmanto savas būvniecības prasmes, lai pārveidotu super auto mazgātavu un nomazgātu fermeres Zojas sušķīgos dzīvniekus.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pārklāj māju ar burvju produktu, lai novērstu ūdens sūci. Nākamajā dienā māja saplok kā balons. Putns uzvij ligzdu uz Barbazū vēdera. Barbazū grib kļūt par lieu koku, lai sniegtu patvērumu dzīvniekiem. Situācija kļūst sarežģīta.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais uzbūvē māju kokā. Barbamamma ir apņēmusies novērst piesārņojumu.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims izzina Rūkoņtaunu, lai atrastu vietu, kur baudīt jautrību vienatnē. Tims un Kaja cenšas sarīkot Pārkijam neaizmirstamu dienu. Kad vētras dēļ Reksiem jāpaliek mājās, viņiem jāizdomā, kā pavadīt laiku.

programme.title: Rabla komanda

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Jauni piedzīvojumi ar DORU! Pievienojies drošajai pasaules pētītājai Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu kopīgajos ceļojumos pa maģisko lietusmežu, kurā var notikt - un notiek - brīnumu lietas. Lets go!

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Dvīņi ciemojas Barbagudrā istabā. Kādus sapņus sasniegtu, ja es būtu miljardieris?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ceļojumā uz Parīzi ģimene apskatīs lielisko Luvru. Diemžēl Barbalala neievēro strikto noteikumu - muzejā neēst. // Barbalala strikti ievēro ačgārnās dienas tradīcijas, kas cēlušās no seniem laikiem. Brāļi un māsas pievienojas viņai ačgārnajā dienā.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims cenšas būt divos pasākumos reizē. Tims meklē Kajai uzkodu bez purvzāles. Pēc vairākiem zaudējumiem Tija cenšas uzvarēt visās ballīšu spēlēs.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Motorei vajag palīdzību ugunsdzēsēju depo, pilsētā ierodas jauns ugunsdzēsēju kapteinis, lai apmācītu visus ķepaiņus. Čārdžers grib palīdzēt Sjerrai Spīdošajai ar viņas jauno šovu, bet viņa savainotā ķepa izraisa konusveidīgus sarežģījumus.
